tools.name: accidentStats.accidentStatsGet
tools.description: Gets all accident details for accidents occuring in the specified year

tools.name: airQuality.airQualityGet
tools.description: Gets air quality data feed

tools.name: bikePoint.bikePointGet
tools.description: Gets the bike point with the given id.

tools.name: bikePoint.bikePointGetAll
tools.description:
Gets all bike point locations. The Place object has an addtionalProperties array which contains the nbBikes, nbDocks and nbSpaces
            numbers which give the status of the BikePoint. A mismatch in these numbers i.e. nbDocks - (nbBikes + nbSpaces) != 0 indicates broken docks.

tools.name: bikePoint.bikePointSearch
tools.description:
Search for bike stations by their name, a bike point's name often contains information about the name of the street
            or nearby landmarks, for example. Note that the search result does not contain the PlaceProperties i.e. the status
            or occupancy of the BikePoint, to get that information you should retrieve the BikePoint by its id on /BikePoint/id.

tools.name: cabwise.cabwiseGet
tools.description: Gets taxis and minicabs contact information

tools.name: journey.journeyJourneyResults
tools.description: Perform a Journey Planner search from the parameters specified in simple types

tools.name: journey.journeyMeta
tools.description: Gets a list of all of the available journey planner modes

tools.name: line.lineArrivals
tools.description: Get the list of arrival predictions for given line ids based at the given stop

tools.name: line.lineDisruption
tools.description: Get disruptions for the given line ids

tools.name: line.lineDisruptionByMode
tools.description: Get disruptions for all lines of the given modes.

tools.name: line.lineGet
tools.description: Gets lines that match the specified line ids.

tools.name: line.lineGetByMode
tools.description: Gets lines that serve the given modes.

tools.name: line.lineLineRoutesByIds
tools.description: Get all valid routes for given line ids, including the name and id of the originating and terminating stops for each route.

tools.name: line.lineMetaDisruptionCategories
tools.description: Gets a list of valid disruption categories

tools.name: line.lineMetaModes
tools.description: Gets a list of valid modes

tools.name: line.lineMetaServiceTypes
tools.description: Gets a list of valid ServiceTypes to filter on

tools.name: line.lineMetaSeverity
tools.description: Gets a list of valid severity codes

tools.name: line.lineRoute
tools.description: Get all valid routes for all lines, including the name and id of the originating and terminating stops for each route.

tools.name: line.lineRouteByMode
tools.description: Gets all lines and their valid routes for given modes, including the name and id of the originating and terminating stops for each route

tools.name: line.lineRouteSequence
tools.description: Gets all valid routes for given line id, including the sequence of stops on each route.

tools.name: line.lineSearch
tools.description: Search for lines or routes matching the query string

tools.name: line.lineStatus
tools.description: Gets the line status for given line ids during the provided dates e.g Minor Delays

tools.name: line.lineStatusByIds
tools.description: Gets the line status of for given line ids e.g Minor Delays

tools.name: line.lineStatusByMode
tools.description: Gets the line status of for all lines for the given modes

tools.name: line.lineStatusBySeverity
tools.description:
Gets the line status for all lines with a given severity
            A list of valid severity codes can be obtained from a call to Line/Meta/Severity

tools.name: line.lineStopPoints
tools.description: Gets a list of the stations that serve the given line id

tools.name: line.lineTimetable
tools.description: Gets the timetable for a specified station on the give line

tools.name: line.lineTimetableTo
tools.description: Gets the timetable for a specified station on the give line with specified destination

tools.name: mode.modeArrivals
tools.description: Gets the next arrival predictions for all stops of a given mode

tools.name: mode.modeGetActiveServiceTypes
tools.description:
Returns the service type active for a mode.
            Currently only supports tube

tools.name: occupancy.getOccupancyCarPark
tools.description: Gets the occupancy for all car parks that have occupancy data

tools.name: occupancy.occupancyGet
tools.description: Gets the occupancy for a car park with a given id

tools.name: occupancy.occupancyGetAllChargeConnectorStatus
tools.description: Gets the occupancy for all charge connectors

tools.name: occupancy.occupancyGetBikePointsOccupancies
tools.description: Get the occupancy for bike points.

tools.name: occupancy.occupancyGetChargeConnectorStatus
tools.description: Gets the occupancy for a charge connectors with a given id (sourceSystemPlaceId)

tools.name: place.placeGet
tools.description: Gets the place with the given id.

tools.name: place.placeGetAt
tools.description:
Gets any places of the given type whose geography intersects the given latitude and longitude. In practice this means the Place
            must be polygonal e.g. a BoroughBoundary.

tools.name: place.placeGetByGeo
tools.description:
Gets the places that lie within a geographic region. The geographic region of interest can either be specified
            by using a lat/lon geo-point and a radius in metres to return places within the locus defined by the lat/lon of
            its centre or alternatively, by the use of a bounding box defined by the lat/lon of its north-west and south-east corners.
            Optionally filters on type and can strip properties for a smaller payload.

tools.name: place.placeGetByType
tools.description: Gets all places of a given type

tools.name: place.placeGetOverlay
tools.description: Gets the place overlay for a given set of co-ordinates and a given width/height.

tools.name: place.placeGetStreetsByPostCode
tools.description: Gets the set of streets associated with a post code.

tools.name: place.placeMetaCategories
tools.description: Gets a list of all of the available place property categories and keys.

tools.name: place.placeMetaPlaceTypes
tools.description: Gets a list of the available types of Place.

tools.name: place.placeSearch
tools.description: Gets all places that matches the given query

tools.name: road.getRoadIds
tools.description: Gets the road with the specified id (e.g. A1)

tools.name: road.roadDisruptedStreets
tools.description: Gets a list of disrupted streets. If no date filters are provided, current disruptions are returned.

tools.name: road.roadDisruption
tools.description: Get active disruptions, filtered by road ids

tools.name: road.roadDisruptionById
tools.description: Gets a list of active disruptions filtered by disruption Ids.

tools.name: road.roadGet
tools.description: Gets all roads managed by TfL

tools.name: road.roadMetaCategories
tools.description: Gets a list of valid RoadDisruption categories

tools.name: road.roadMetaSeverities
tools.description: Gets a list of valid RoadDisruption severity codes

tools.name: road.roadStatus
tools.description: Gets the specified roads with the status aggregated over the date range specified, or now until the end of today if no dates are passed.

tools.name: search.searchBusSchedules
tools.description: Searches the bus schedules folder on S3 for a given bus number.

tools.name: search.searchGet
tools.description:
Search the site for occurrences of the query string. The maximum number of results returned is equal to the maximum page size
            of 100. To return subsequent pages, use the paginated overload.

tools.name: search.searchMetaCategories
tools.description: Gets the available search categories.

tools.name: search.searchMetaSearchProviders
tools.description: Gets the available searchProvider names.

tools.name: search.searchMetaSorts
tools.description: Gets the available sorting options.

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointArrivalDepartures
tools.description: Gets the list of arrival and departure predictions for the given stop point id (overground, Elizabeth line and thameslink only)

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointArrivals
tools.description: Gets the list of arrival predictions for the given stop point id

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointCrowding
tools.description: Gets all the Crowding data (static) for the StopPointId, plus crowding data for a given line and optionally a particular direction.

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointDirection
tools.description: Returns the canonical direction, "inbound" or "outbound", for a given pair of stop point Ids in the direction from -> to.

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointDisruption
tools.description: Gets all disruptions for the specified StopPointId, plus disruptions for any child Naptan records it may have.

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointDisruptionByMode
tools.description: Gets a distinct list of disrupted stop points for the given modes

tools.description: Gets all the stop points of given type(s) with a page number

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointGetCarParksById

tools.name: stopPoint.stopPointGetTaxiRanksByIds
